---
name: 🐞 Bug Report

### ❗ Issue

Describe the problem (e.g., broken link, formatting, image not loading).

### 🎯 Expected

What did you expect to see?

### 🛑 Actual

What did you see instead?

### 📍 Where

- Section: (e.g., About / Featured Projects / Sponsorship)
- Link (if applicable):

### 📝 Additional context

Screenshots or notes (optional).
